summary: Iteration 62 features verified: Mobile layer collision fix working (z-[10000]/z-[10001]), camera permission preflight step implemented with localStorage persistence, 'Hold your surfboard up!' instruction prominently displayed, Stoke Sponsor Leaderboard API working with time range filters. All 7 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified via Playwright.

jump_in_modal_z_index_fix.details: JumpInSessionModal uses z-[10000] for backdrop and z-[10001] for content, properly hiding photographer card when opened

camera_permission_preflight.details: New users see 'Camera Access Required' preflight step before selfie capture. Shows 'Enable Camera' heading with cyan camera icon

localstorage_camera_persistence.details: localStorage key 'raw_surf_camera_authorized' is checked on modal open - if 'true', skips preflight and goes directly to selfie step

hold_surfboard_instruction.details: 'Hold your surfboard up!' instruction prominently displayed with 🏄 surfboard emoji, cyan styling, and helper text 'This helps the photographer find you in the lineup'

mobile_full_bleed_modal.details: Modal container uses safe-area-inset padding: padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px); padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px)

bottom_sheet_hides_on_jump_in.details: In MapPage.js, setBottomSheetOpen(false) is called before setShowJumpInModal(true), hiding the photographer card

stoke_sponsor_leaderboard_api.details: Returns time_range, stats (total_contributed, total_to_groms, total_sponsors), and leaderboard array with rank, photographer_id, full_name, total_contributed, contribution_count, grom_percentage

stoke_sponsor_leaderboard_page.details: Page loads with data-testid='stoke-sponsor-leaderboard', shows heart icon header, community stats, time range filter buttons (This Week, This Month, All Time), and leaderboard entries

critical_code_review_comments: z-index hierarchy properly implemented: z-[1000] for UnifiedSpotDrawer, z-[9998] for photographer bottom sheet, z-[10000]/z-[10001] for JumpInSessionModal
localStorage camera persistence uses key 'raw_surf_camera_authorized' consistently in both JumpInSessionModal.js and UnifiedSpotDrawer.js
Safe-area-inset CSS properly handles iPhone notch/home indicator for full bleed modal design
Stoke Sponsor Leaderboard properly aggregates contributions from SponsorshipTransaction table with time range filtering
seed_data_creation: Used existing live photographer (Sarah Waters at Atlantic Beach) for Jump In flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 62 features working. JumpInSessionModal z-index is z-[10000]/z-[10001] to ensure it's above all other drawers. Camera permission persistence uses localStorage key 'raw_surf_camera_authorized'. Stoke Sponsor Leaderboard at /career/stoke-leaderboard with time range filters. Map page Live Photographers shows shooting status with markers.
screenshots_taken: 24-26 (Map desktop - marker click, photographer card, Jump In modal)
28-30 (Map mobile - photographer card, Jump In modal)
